dj_text: That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. Zero chill. All music. Moving on from He's a Pirate (Pirates of The Caribbean) - Medieval Style to Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up (Medieval Style Cover, Bardcore). You'll survive. Probably. One more left in the queue.
